success_criteria: menu honors all attending guest dietary constraints
prep timeline includes defrost, prep, preheat, and cleanup timing
shopping and appliance actions are tiered proposals
appliance prep includes an oven preheat before service and dishwasher cleanup before quiet hours
no nut-containing dish or shopping item is proposed

context.notes: Use guest RSVP data and household appliances to sort dinner prep end to end. Include an oven-warmed vegetarian dish if compatible with constraints.
